decision: Gate 1 approved to proceed to Architecture
rationale: Requirements artifact generated, challenger review completed, accepted findings applied, and remaining should-fix risks rejected by user.
Meets 99.9% SLA without cross-region transfer; GDPR-safe (no data leaves swedencentral). LRS fails AZ-impacted SLA; GRS would break single-region EU residency posture.

EUR 500/month hard MVP budget cannot absorb App Gateway WAF v2 (~56/mo) or Front Door WAF (~0/mo). Mitigations for dev MVP: App Service access restrictions, TLS 1.2 min, Entra auth, no anonymous endpoints. Revisit before prod launch.

decision: Single App Service instance for MVP dev
rationale: P0v3 1-instance gives 99.95% individual SLA but end-to-end serial composition lands at ~99.78%, below 99.9% NFR. Accepted for dev environment only; production requires two-instance + AZ spread.

decision: External user identity = Microsoft Entra External ID
rationale: Resolves Step 1 finding efec9ebd. Entra External ID for customers (GA May 2024) replaces deprecated Azure AD B2C. Free tier covers 50k MAU - well above 10k consumers + 500 restaurants. Staff stay on org Entra ID tenant.

decision: Storage replication = LRS; no zonal in MVP
rationale: User revise at Phase 6a SKU gate: zonal deployments not required in MVP dev across any service. Storage downgraded from ZRS to LRS. End-to-end serial SLA composes to ~99.74% (below 99.9% NFR) — accepted as documented MVP risk. Revisit zonal + ZRS for production.
User-imposed cap at SKU gate retry. Bounds LA ingest at ~31 GB/month = 1.30 (vs 45 unbounded). Cap enforced via workspace dailyQuotaGb setting. Acceptable for MVP dev observability.
User-supplied at Step 1 requirements. Step 2 pricing total 92.78 USD (~EUR 268), 54% utilization — Case B silent skip.

decision: Step 2 challenger review accepted 6 of 9 findings; 3 skips documented in sidecar
rationale: 0 must_fix from both architecture (comprehensive) and cost-estimate (cost-feasibility) passes. Accepted: SLA gate-2 record, LA telemetry-loss controls, LRS data-protection controls, cost-trace scoping note, dedup reconciliation note, AVM Step 4 carry-forward. Skipped (with rationale in sidecar): WAF compensating controls, Farm M2M contract (Step 3 ADR home), GDPR erasure boundaries (Step 1 finding rejected).
